title: Tasty Canadian Pak Choi Fried Rice
description: A quick and easy Canadian dish featuring pak choi and double-fry KFC style, perfect for a weeknight dinner, ovo-vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the chopped pak choi and cook until wilted, about 2 minutes.
Push the pak choi mixture to one side of the skillet, then add a little more oil if necessary.
Pour the beaten eggs into the other side of the skillet and scramble them until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the pak choi mixture.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
Stir-fry the rice with the pak choi and egg mixture for about 2 minutes, until everything is well combined.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and pepper, and stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
